title: World Cup Guofeng Stadium Portrait AI
sourceTitle: World Cup Guofeng Stadium Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 realistic World Cup guofeng stadium interaction portrait for Brazil national-team supporter direction, using fixed source color palette with concrete palette cues from the prompt as the supporter color system. Subject: adult East Asian young woman with natural clear features, real skin texture, and a sweet excited match-day expression leans toward the phone camera with a gentle excited smile, natural eye contact, real skin texture, clear facial detail, and lively match-day presence. Scene: daytime World Cup stadium spectator area with blue sky and clear pitch view with visible large stadium stands, spectator seating, guardrails, venue structure, and distant green football pitch. Composition: Fixed close slightly-low waist-height phone perspective, with the subject leaning forward naturally, hands interacting with small supporter ribbon, mini flag, and fabric layers near the hands, face near the upper frame, and realistic near-far perspective with clean editorial framing. Signature Elements: Near-camera low phone perspective, forward-leaning supporter pose, guofeng-inspired stadium outfit, small supporter props near the hands, hair ornaments and ribbons in team colors, clear football stands, guardrails, venue architecture, and distant green pitch. Fixed source details: Team Color Palette: yellow, green, and blue supporter accents. Style: High-definition realistic portrait photography with summer stadium energy, guofeng-inspired fashion styling, natural skin texture, real fabric folds, clean mobile snapshot intimacy, and polished editorial restraint. Color Palette: fixed source color palette with concrete palette cues from the prompt appears in hair ornaments, fabric trims, ribbons, and small supporter details while the overall photograph keeps natural daylight color and realistic skin tones. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: 人物上半身明显向镜头前探，肩膀、锁骨、胸前衣襟和手部靠近画面下方，形成近大远小透视和亲密互动感。 uses real fabric folds, light gauze, embroidery edges, draped ribbons, and layered skirt or sash texture with stable hands and accessories. Restrictions: Keep an adult subject, tasteful energetic pose, clean editorial framing, natural skin texture, stable hands, coherent clothing layers, believable stadium background, balanced exposure, and lively but natural expression.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
